description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. He logged 10 hrs 8 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 26 mins. His tracked work was spread across 5 projects, and his top languages were Python, Markdown, TypeScript, SQL, and JSON.
